retry_reason: refcount_dec_and_test always succeeds; if the refcount reaches zero, the object is freed and must not be reused. Retrying a put on an already freed object would be a double-free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases one reference on a btrfs_delayed_ref_head. It unconditionally decrements the refcount via refcount_dec_and_test and frees the object via kmem_cache_free if the refcount reaches zero. After this call, the caller must not access the head pointer because the object may be freed. The caller is responsible for ensuring that the reference being released was previously acquired (e.g., via btrfs_get_delayed_ref_head or similar). This function does not return any value; the caller does not need to check for failure.
